attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: external_credential_source_face
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: The external credential reference resolves to the intended Dexter paper-live demo credential source for the bounded supervised window.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before the credential reference changes or the bounded supervised window rolls forward; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: attestor name, reference label only, bounded window, verification timestamp, and a plain-language confirmation that the referenced credential source was resolved outside repo; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: the credential reference changes or the bounded supervised window rolls forward
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the repo can point to a current attestation record for this face without exposing secret material and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.current_refresh_observation: Blocked because template_only_manifest, outside_repo_locator_not_supplied, attestors_missing, evidence_locator_missing, locator_kind_missing, verification_timestamp_missing, fresh_until_missing, bounded_window_missing. Operator input still needed: Provide one current non-secret locator that confirms which Dexter paper-live credential source was resolved for the bounded supervised window.

attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: venue_ref_face
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: The repo-visible venue reference points to the intended Dexter demo venue for the bounded supervised retry window.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before the venue reference changes, venue routing changes, or the supervised window is rescheduled; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: attestor names, venue reference label, bounded window, verification timestamp, and explicit match confirmation between the marker and the intended venue; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: the venue reference changes, venue routing changes, or the supervised window is rescheduled
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the venue attestation is current, explicit, and reviewable without requiring the reviewer to infer the mapping and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.current_refresh_observation: Blocked because template_only_manifest, outside_repo_locator_not_supplied, attestors_missing, evidence_locator_missing, locator_kind_missing, verification_timestamp_missing, fresh_until_missing, bounded_window_missing. Operator input still needed: Provide one current non-secret locator that ties the repo-visible venue marker to the exact Dexter demo venue for the bounded supervised window.

attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: account_ref_face
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: The repo-visible account reference points to the intended Dexter paper-live demo account for the bounded supervised window.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before the account reference changes or a different demo account is selected for the window; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: attestor name, account reference label, bounded window, verification timestamp, and a statement that the external account binding was checked outside repo; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: the account reference changes or a different demo account is selected for the window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the account attestation makes the intended demo account explicit enough to reopen gate review and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.current_refresh_observation: Blocked because template_only_manifest, outside_repo_locator_not_supplied, attestors_missing, evidence_locator_missing, locator_kind_missing, verification_timestamp_missing, fresh_until_missing, bounded_window_missing. Operator input still needed: Provide one current non-secret locator that shows which Dexter paper-live demo account the bounded supervised window is bound to.

attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: connectivity_profile_face
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: The intended connectivity profile can reach the intended Dexter demo venue and account during the bounded supervised window.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before network routing changes, connectivity profile changes, or the verification timestamp is outside the current window; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: attestor names, connectivity profile label, verification timestamp, bounded window, and a short reachability result; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: network routing changes, connectivity profile changes, or the verification timestamp is outside the current window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the connectivity attestation is current enough that a gate reviewer can treat reachability as explicitly checked and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.current_refresh_observation: Blocked because template_only_manifest, outside_repo_locator_not_supplied, attestors_missing, evidence_locator_missing, locator_kind_missing, verification_timestamp_missing, fresh_until_missing, bounded_window_missing. Operator input still needed: Provide one current non-secret locator that shows the intended connectivity profile was checked for venue/account reachability inside the bounded supervised window.

attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: operator_owner_face
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: One explicit operator owner is responsible for the full retry-gate review and bounded supervised window.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before the named owner changes or the supervised window changes; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: owner name or handle, verification timestamp, window label, and explicit ownership statement; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: the named owner changes or the supervised window changes
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the owner attestation is explicit enough that gate recheck does not rely on unnamed responsibility and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.current_refresh_observation: Blocked because template_only_manifest, outside_repo_locator_not_supplied, attestors_missing, evidence_locator_missing, locator_kind_missing, verification_timestamp_missing, fresh_until_missing, bounded_window_missing. Operator input still needed: Name one explicit operator owner and provide one reviewable non-secret locator that shows ownership for the bounded supervised window.

attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: bounded_start_criteria_face
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: The intended supervised start window, go/no-go owner, and abort owner are explicit and bounded for the next reviewable retry attempt.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before the scheduled window moves or ownership for go/no-go or abort changes; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: planned start window, bounded window minutes, go/no-go owner, abort owner, verification timestamp, and explicit stop condition note; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: the scheduled window moves or ownership for go/no-go or abort changes
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the bounded-start attestation makes timing and ownership explicit enough to reopen gate review and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.current_refresh_observation: Blocked because template_only_manifest, outside_repo_locator_not_supplied, attestors_missing, evidence_locator_missing, locator_kind_missing, verification_timestamp_missing, fresh_until_missing, bounded_window_missing. Operator input still needed: Provide one current non-secret locator that fixes the bounded start window plus the go/no-go and abort owners for the next supervised retry attempt.

attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: allowlist_symbol_lot_reconfirmed
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: The explicit allowlist, default symbol, lot size, bounded window, and one-position cap were reconfirmed for the upcoming supervised window.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before any guardrail value changes or the supervised window moves; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: attestor name, verification timestamp, allowlist values, lot-size values, position cap, and a plain-language reconfirmation note; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: any guardrail value changes or the supervised window moves
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the guardrail attestation is current enough that gate recheck can treat the bounded demo envelope as explicitly reconfirmed and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.current_refresh_observation: Blocked because template_only_manifest, outside_repo_locator_not_supplied, attestors_missing, evidence_locator_missing, locator_kind_missing, verification_timestamp_missing, fresh_until_missing, bounded_window_missing. Operator input still needed: Provide one current non-secret locator that reconfirms the allowlist, default symbol, lot size, one-position cap, and bounded window guardrails for the next supervised attempt.

attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: manual_latched_stop_all_visibility_reconfirmed
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: `manual_latched_stop_all` remains visibly reachable on the bounded retry path for the next supervised window.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before the stop-all surface changes or the window advances without reconfirmation; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: attestor name, verification timestamp, referenced stop-all surface, and a plain-language visibility confirmation; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: the stop-all surface changes or the window advances without reconfirmation
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the stop-all visibility attestation is current enough to reopen gate review without assuming prior visibility still holds and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.current_refresh_observation: Blocked because template_only_manifest, outside_repo_locator_not_supplied, attestors_missing, evidence_locator_missing, locator_kind_missing, verification_timestamp_missing, fresh_until_missing, bounded_window_missing. Operator input still needed: Provide one current non-secret locator that freshly reconfirms `manual_latched_stop_all` visibility for the bounded supervised window.

attestation_refresh_decision_surface.name: terminal_snapshot_readability_reconfirmed
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.what_refreshed_face_covers: Terminal snapshot detail remains readable enough for the upcoming supervised retry window.
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.refresh_trigger: refresh before the snapshot format changes or the supervised window advances without reconfirmation; otherwise keep the face blocked for record-pack regeneration
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.minimum_fresh_evidence_locator_shape: attestor name, verification timestamp, referenced snapshot surface, and a short readability confirmation; plus one repo-visible fresh-enough verification timestamp inside the current bounded supervised window and a locator that can be reopened without exposing secrets
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.stale_condition: the snapshot format changes or the supervised window advances without reconfirmation
attestation_refresh_decision_surface.usable_for_retry_gate_review_when: the snapshot-readability attestation is current enough that a gate reviewer can rely on terminal visibility without inference and the located evidence is still fresh enough for the current bounded supervised window

Operator input still needed: Provide one current non-secret locator that freshly reconfirms terminal snapshot readability for the bounded supervised window.

sub_agents.name: Anscombe
lines: Reverified PR `#91` / merge commit `014723587b100fb0046646d40b445537584b44ea` as latest merged `main`, then treated the record-pack-regeneration lane as the current repo-visible baseline rather than reopening older refresh assumptions.

The shared evidence-preflight path now owns the reopen-readiness mapping, aggregated blocker reasons, and canonical manifest-to-proof references so refresh and regeneration stop re-deriving them separately.

Current-pointer risk remains atomic: summary, context, manifest, ledger, README, bundle metadata, and handoff surfaces must all reflect the same fail-closed truth once the canonical preflight and compatibility gap outputs are written together.

sub_agents.name: Euler
lines: Confirmed no architecture drift: the planner boundary stays `prepare / start / status / stop / snapshot`, `manual_latched_stop_all` stays planner-owned, Dexter remains `paper_live`, and frozen Mew-X remains `sim_live`.

Kept the fail-closed split crisp: refresh now consumes the canonical evidence preflight for freshness and usability, while regeneration consumes the same shared preflight plus compatibility gap output for inheritance and reviewability without widening runtime scope.
The new contract remains non-secret and bounded; it never implies funded-live access, broader venue scope, or Dexter / Mew-X runtime rewrites.

sub_agents.name: Parfit
lines: The smallest safe implementation is one canonical manifest validator plus a unified preflight/readiness output, with the legacy gap surfaces preserved as compatibility mirrors while refresh and regeneration consume the same shared data.
Validation should start with the evidence-preflight script plus refresh/regeneration tests, then widen to bundle/export coverage and the full pytest suite.
Merge readiness depends on exact agreement across summary, context, manifest, ledger, README, refresh bundle metadata, and the canonical external-evidence paths from the PR `#91` baseline.
